history: Emily and Noah were close friends. Noah trusted Emily more than most people.
secretsShared: Noah told Emily someone was watching him.

history: Emily knows Alex from the cafe and considers him friendly but evasive.
Mason believes Sarah makes investigations harder by publishing too early.
Sarah believes Mason hides more from the town than he admits.
secretsShared: Sarah has a police leak but Mason does not know the source.

history: Mara distrusts police because of an older case that was buried.
